company.name: Jinhua Shunxi
company.slogan: Professional Pet Supplies Manufacturer from Jinhua, China
company.description: Jinhua Shunxi is a professional pet supplies manufacturer specializing in high-quality dog toys, harnesses, cat litter boxes, and pet accessories. We provide OEM/ODM services for global customers with competitive prices and reliable quality.

products.name: Dog TPR Chew Toy
products.description: Durable TPR rubber toy, non-toxic and bite-resistant. Perfect for aggressive chewers, promotes dental health and endless fun.

products.name: Dog Harness Vest
products.description: Adjustable no-pull dog harness with breathable mesh. Comfortable fit for small to large dogs, reflective strips for night safety.

products.name: Cat Litter Box
products.description: Large enclosed litter box with scoop and filter. Odor control design, easy-to-clean drawer system, suitable for cats of all sizes.

products.name: Dog Poop Bags
products.description: Eco-friendly biodegradable dog waste bags, 300 counts per pack. Leak-proof design with easy-tear perforation, includes dispenser.
